title: Month Summary
description: Monthly financial summary with income, expenses, and expense treemap breakdown

widgets.title: Total Income
widgets.query: SELECT currency, SUM(amount) * -1 AS amount FROM postings WHERE account_type = 'Income' AND year = :year AND CAST(strftime('%m', transaction_date) AS INTEGER) = :month GROUP BY currency HAVING amount != 0 ORDER BY currency

widgets.title: Total Expenses
widgets.query: SELECT currency, SUM(amount) AS amount FROM postings WHERE account_type = 'Expenses' AND year = :year AND CAST(strftime('%m', transaction_date) AS INTEGER) = :month GROUP BY currency HAVING amount != 0 ORDER BY currency

widgets.title: Estimated Taxes
widgets.query: SELECT currency, (SUM(amount) / 2.0) * -1 AS amount FROM postings WHERE account_type = 'Income' AND LOWER(account) LIKE 'income:gross%' AND year = :year AND CAST(strftime('%m', transaction_date) AS INTEGER) = :month GROUP BY currency HAVING amount != 0 ORDER BY currency

widgets.title: Estimated Savings
widgets.query: SELECT currency, (-1 * SUM(CASE WHEN account_type = 'Income' THEN amount ELSE 0 END)) - ((SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(account) LIKE 'income:gross%' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) / 2.0) * -1) - (SUM(CASE WHEN account_type = 'Expenses' THEN amount ELSE 0 END)) AS amount FROM postings WHERE year = :year AND CAST(strftime('%m', transaction_date) AS INTEGER) = :month GROUP BY currency HAVING amount != 0 ORDER BY currency
